transcript.text: A few years earlier, there might have been great concern among Microsoft senior managers about the condition of Bill Gates when he showed up the next morning. The computer geek, once ridiculed for his personal appearance, had cleaned up. Literally.

The personal changes in Gates had been as dramatic as the increase in his wealth, which was now approaching a staggering $20 billion. Forbes had recently named him the world's richest individual. He was also one of the world's most powerful. He was so well known internationally that he conducted his own foreign policy, calling on China's president and other world leaders during business trips. He socialized with Warren Buffett.
